mapper.select: SELECT id AS studentId, student_no AS studentNo, name, gender, major, user_id AS userId FROM student WHERE id = #{studentId}
SELECT id AS studentId, student_no AS studentNo, name, gender, major, user_id AS userId FROM student
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (student_no, name, gender, major, user_id) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{major}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_no = #{studentNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, major = #{major}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{studentId}
